body:
The best translation is the translation that survives round trip translation.

So we should by default find such formulation for translation, that is more likely and in most part will survive round trip translation.

We need to make sure that all our logic related to formal translation via meta language (between programming languages, between natural languages) all have round trip translation quality test.

Translation to meta language from any other language must have zero data loss, meaning, roundtrip from meta language and back must work always.

Yet we also need to test roundtrips from Rust to meta language to JavaScript (roundtrip via meta language between JavaScript and Rust), from JavaScript to meta language to Rust (and round trip). The same for Russian -> meta language -> English, English -> meta language -> Russian. So Rust <-> JavaScript, Russian <-> English and so on. We should support tests for all roundtrips between each separate language and meta language, and between each 2 languages we support via meta language.

We should never support direct translation without meta language, as doing so will be computationally unsolvable.

For example if we have 100 languages, translators between them will be 100 * 100 = 10 000, and if we have 100 languages + meta language, we will need only 200 translators (to and from meta language from each 100 languages).

Make sure our vision, requirements, roadmap and contributing guide all do not contradict this, and all include all relevant text about the case.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Translation quality test
